title: Z@bul #2083
definition:
Zebul = "exalted"

 1) chief man of the city of Shechem at the time of the contest between
    Abimelech and the native Canaanites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zebul = "exalted"

 1) chief man of the city of Shechem at the time of the contest between
    Abimelech and the native Canaanites

    NASB:  an officer of Abimelech
